response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse background in software engineering, but his experience lacks depth in the core C++ and industrial automation domains required for this role. His expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure is impressive but not directly aligned with the job's focus on C++, secure industrial systems, and cloud platform solutions for automation machinery.
strengths: Extensive experience with full-stack development and modern software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile).
Proven ability to work on high-performance, scalable systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, GISCollective platform).
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing background (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last notable C++ work was at National Instruments in 2007-2008).
No explicit mention of industrial automation, IoT protocols, or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Primary expertise lies in web and mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which is not the focus of this role.

key_factors.factor: Software engineering best practices and mentorship
